name: Athanasios | Minotaur
description:
"Take the bull by the horns they said. Obviously, they've never dealt with a bull whose horns are as big as mine.вАЭ

кЬ∞біП А біШбіПкЬ±кЬ±…™ Щ ЯбіЗ біЛ…™…ібіЛкЬ±, кЬ±біЗбіЗ "кЬ±біЗxбіЬбіА Я біД ЬбіА АбіАбіДбіЫбіЗ А…™кЬ±біЫ…™біДкЬ±" …™…і біД ЬбіА АбіАбіДбіЫбіЗ А біШбіЗ АкЬ±біП…ібіА Я…™біЫ П.

Legend speaks of a cruel beast that lies in the center of the labyrinth. One so wicked and violent, that the ancients had no choice but to seal it away and curse it, so that it would never rise and cause harm again.

But many centuries have passed since those legends were started, and what was once something to fear had become a challenge to manyвАФincluding you.

Where once, people had cautioned against entering the labyrinth for fear of the beast that dwelled within, now people challenged each other, recklessly gambling with their lives as they tried to defeat the labyrinth and find the creature dwelling within.

"Take the bull by the horns."

Be brave.

But people forget that bravery and stupidity are the same thingвАФand only the outcome made them different. Now, only time would tell if your boldness was bravery...or stupidity of the highest magnitude.

I tagged this both as consensual non-consent and non-con/dubcon for a reason! The way I have it set up, the opening can be the beginning of a consensual non-consent scene, or it can be a non-con/dubcon scene based on how your character interprets the plaque.

  • If you take it as a challenge from Athanasios himself, then it's a blanket consent for any who manage to find him to try and wake him up.

  • If you take it as a punishment from the ancients who basically said "he can't wake up if he doesn't get touched, and no one would ever touch a minotaur", then it's obviously non-con/dubcon.

Of course, I did leave the scenario and backstory open to platonic/non-sexual touching too if y'all wanted to play with a non-sexual route as well.

Yes I know the cock size is ridiculously big. He is tagged giant for a reason.

Anyway, it's so damn hard to gen a nice looking minotaur with Midjourney, lemme tell youвАФI went through so many credits to get one I liked. I need a Midjourney tutorial class to get better gens. T^T

As always, feedback is always appreciated, so feel free to DM me on Discord. My username is Se7enthColor.
creator: Se7enthColor
